requirement: the README reflects what the CLI and spec actually provide

findings.observation: Status is handled carefully overall: an Alpha callout, a 'CLI is an early work in progress' note, and the evaluation/result resources explicitly marked (planned).
npm (npx quality.md) and Homebrew installs are marked as arriving with the first tagged release — placeholders correctly flagged as provisional.

Inaccuracy: 'The planned commands above other than init and lint fail with unknown command until they land' implies models and spec are not built and fail — but the local build runs both 'qualitymd models list' and 'qualitymd spec' successfully, and line 169 itself lists models and spec as currently built. This statement contradicts the CLI's actual behavior and the same README.

rationale: Planned and provisional items are marked with discipline, holding the floor, but one statement misrepresents which commands work today (claiming models/spec fail) and contradicts the README's own Install section. A reader is misled about available capability. Rated minimum.
